examples: John was trying to slink into the house by the back door.
He decided that he couldn't just slink away, so he went and sat next to his wife.
He wavered, and started to slink away, but Tom seized him and said, "Aunt Polly, it ain't fair."
Should Amazon just declare victory and its competitors fold their tents and slink off?
The critics (like this shortsighted one on Seeking Alpha) will slink back into the shadows.
